selected_nodes.text: James worked on a programming project combining gaming with programming, creating a virtual world inspired by Witcher 3 with a game character he designed.

selected_nodes.text: James got the idea for the virtual world from a stranger he saw while walking his dogs and found inspiring.

selected_nodes.text: The game 'Witcher 3' inspired James to create his own game, pushing him to make something special.
